# CWE-112 negative: required fields validated before use
lang: go
file: CWE-112-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/xml"
	"net/http"
	"regexp"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var invoiceIDPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`^[A-Z0-9-]{8,32}$`)

// CWE-112 Missing XML Validation (mitigated)
func AcceptInvoice(c *gin.Context) {
	payload, err := c.GetRawData()
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "body"})
		return
	}
	var invoice struct {
		ID     string  `xml:"id"`
		Amount float64 `xml:"amount"`
	}
	if err := xml.Unmarshal(payload, &invoice); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "xml"})
		return
	}
	if !invoiceIDPattern.MatchString(invoice.ID) || invoice.Amount <= 0 {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "schema"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": invoice.ID, "amount": invoice.Amount})
}
